## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- macOS version: [e.g., 14.2]
- App version: [e.g., 1.2.0]
- SSH server OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Console Errors

If applicable, paste any errors from View > Toggle Developer Tools > Console.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
